title: Company Names Tribunal decision: BHP Alpha Chemical Group Ltd
body: "Application number 5142  Applicant BHP Group Limited objected to the name used by BHP Alpha Chemical Group Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 2 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of BHP Alpha Chemical Group Ltd is changed to 15455100, LTD. "
